hero.headline: We build intelligent systems, not just websites
hero.subtitle: We architect automation workflows, design scalable CRM infrastructure, and build digital systems that think and adapt. Your business, evolved.

services.title: Services built to elevate your brand
services.subtitle: We combine strategic thinking with meticulous craft to deliver digital experiences that define categories.
services.brandStrategyDesc: Defining the core narrative and visual language that makes your brand unforgettable in a saturated market.
services.digitalCurationDesc: End-to-end digital experiences crafted with editorial precision and technical excellence.
services.visualIdentityDesc: Strategic visual systems that communicate your brand's essence across every touchpoint.
services.experienceDesignDesc: Human-centric interfaces that transform complex workflows into intuitive, delightful journeys.
services.investmentDesc: We evaluate every engagement by operational complexity, system architecture, and business goals — not by deliverables or page counts.
services.methodologyDesc: Our process is built on transparency, iteration, and an unwavering commitment to excellence.
services.process01Desc: We begin with a deep analysis of your brand, market position, and user needs. Every decision is data-informed and strategically aligned.
services.process02Desc: Rapid prototyping cycles that refine interactions, validate assumptions, and evolve the design through continuous feedback loops.
services.process03Desc: Pixel-perfect development with rigorous QA, performance optimization, and a seamless handoff process that ensures long-term maintainability.
services.caseStudyDesc: Translating technical monitoring into a dual-view command system that both operators and business clients can understand. A deep product design case study in infrastructure UX.

work.title: Curating Digital Excellence
work.subtitle: A curated selection of projects where strategy meets craft, and ambition meets execution.

about.title: A small studio with big creative energy
about.subtitle: We are a high-frequency collective of specialists dedicated to the art of digital craft.
about.identityDesc: Strategic visual systems that define and differentiate brands in competitive landscapes.
about.digitalDesc: Pixel-perfect interfaces engineered for performance, accessibility, and delight.
about.strategyDesc: Data-informed creative direction that aligns brand vision with market opportunity.
about.ecosystemDesc: Design systems and infrastructure built to grow with your organization.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: We work with founders, startups, and growing businesses looking for design that stands out and systems that scale.
contact.callDesc: Book a free discovery call. We'll discuss your project, answer your questions, and see if we're the right fit.
contact.formPlaceholderMessage: Briefly describe your goals, timeline, and any existing brand assets...
contact.fitTitle: Is Chiti Studio the right fit?
contact.fit01Desc: For companies looking to redefine their visual soul.
contact.fit02Desc: Scalable design systems built for long-term growth.
contact.fit03Desc: Breaking the grid with intentional and elite layouts.
contact.responseDesc: Typically within 24-48 hours. We value deep work and intentional responses over speed.
contact.quote: Whether you need a full website, a product redesign, or a long-term design partner, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: A premium creative agency specializing in UI/UX design, web development, and brand identity. We build intelligent systems.

cta.headline: Ready to evolve your digital infrastructure?
cta.subtitle: Limited intake for Q2. We prioritize partnerships that demand excellence and strategic innovation.

nova.subtitle: Your AI concierge. Ask me anything about our work or services.
